title: @humzaakhalid: YOU CAN RUN CLAUDE CODE FOR $3/MONTH, AND NOBODY IS TALKING ABOUT IT. A developer got a $170 claude code bill in 10 days

whyItMatters: YOU CAN RUN CLAUDE CODE FOR $3/MONTH, AND NOBODY IS TALKING ABOUT IT. A developer got a $170 claude code bill in 10 days, and someone in the comments ended his subscription forever. He bought a Mac mini m4 base ($599). installed ollama. pulled qwen 3.6 14b. ran three commands. pointed Claude's code at localhost instead of anthropic's servers. no api costs.…
